unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved Changes
unsavedChanges.message: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close without saving?

nav.title: Settings
nav.providersDesc: AI provider routing and model selection

hostPicker.noHostAvailable: No host is available for host-specific settings yet.
hostPicker.pairMachineHint: Pair a machine to open machine settings.
hostPicker.selectMachineHint: Select a machine to open machine settings.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize how the application looks and feels.

language.label: Language
language.helper: Choose your preferred language. Browser Default follows your system language.

taskExecution.title: Default Coding Agent
taskExecution.description: Choose the default coding agent for tasks.

executor.label: Default Agent Configuration
executor.helper: Choose the default agent configuration to use when creating a session.

type.label: Editor Type
type.helper: Choose your preferred code editor interface.

customCommand.label: Custom Editor Command
customCommand.helper: Enter the command to launch your custom editor. This will be used to open files.

host.label: Remote SSH Host (Optional)
host.helper: Set this if cdesktop is running on a remote server. When set, clicking "Open in Editor" will generate a URL to open your editor via SSH instead of spawning a local command.

user.label: Remote SSH User (Optional)
user.helper: SSH username for the remote connection. If not set, VS Code will use your SSH config or prompt you.

autoInstallExtension.label: Auto-install VS Code Extension
autoInstallExtension.helper: Automatically install the cdesktop extension when opening a project in VS Code or Cursor. This runs in the background and has no effect if the extension is already installed.

cliSetup.title: GitHub CLI Setup
cliSetup.description: GitHub CLI authentication is required to create pull requests and interact with GitHub repositories.

steps.checkInstalled: Check if GitHub CLI (gh) is installed
steps.installHomebrew: Install it via Homebrew if needed (macOS)

cliSetup.setupNote: The setup will run in the chat window. You'll need to complete the authentication in your browser.

errors.brewMissing: Homebrew is not installed. Install it to enable automatic setup.
errors.notSupported: Automatic setup is not supported on this platform. Install GitHub CLI manually.
errors.setupFailed: Failed to run GitHub CLI setup.

homebrew.description: Automatic installation requires Homebrew. Install Homebrew from
homebrew.manualInstall: and then rerun the setup. Alternatively, install GitHub CLI manually with:

manual.andAuthenticate: and then authenticate with your GitHub account.

branchPrefix.label: Branch Prefix
branchPrefix.helper: Prefix for auto-generated branch names. Leave empty for no prefix.

workspaceDir.label: Session Directory
workspaceDir.helper: Sessions will be created in a .cdesktop-workspaces subdirectory within this path. Leave empty to use the system default. Changes require an app restart.
workspaceDir.dialogDescription: Choose a directory. Sessions will be created in a .cdesktop-workspaces subdirectory within it.

autoDescription.label: Auto-generate PR description by default
autoDescription.helper: When enabled, the AI agent will automatically update the PR title and description after creation.

customPrompt.helper: Custom prompt for the AI agent when generating PR descriptions. Use {pr_number} and {pr_url} as placeholders.

reminder.label: Commit reminder
reminder.helper: Prompt supported agents to commit changes before stopping.

customPrompt.helper: Custom prompt for the commit reminder. The git status will be appended automatically.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Control when and how you receive notifications.

sound.label: Sound Notifications
sound.helper: Play a sound when sessions finish running.
sound.fileHelper: Choose the sound to play when tasks complete. Click the volume button to preview.

push.label: Push Notifications
push.helper: Show system notifications when sessions finish running.

messageInput.title: Message Input
messageInput.description: Configure how messages are sent in the chat input.

shortcut.label: Send message with
shortcut.helper: Choose the keyboard shortcut to send messages.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Help improve cdesktop by sharing anonymous usage data.

telemetry.label: Enable Telemetry
telemetry.helper: Enables anonymous usage events tracking to help improve the application. No prompts or project information are collected.

taskTemplates.title: Tags
taskTemplates.description: Create reusable text snippets that can be inserted into task descriptions using @tag_name.

manager.title: Task Tags
manager.noTags: No tags yet. Create reusable text snippets for common task descriptions. Use @tag_name in any task.
manager.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the tag "{{tagName}}"?

tagName.label: Tag Name
tagName.hint: Use this name with @ in task descriptions: @{{tagName}}
tagName.error: Tag name cannot contain spaces. Use underscores instead (e.g., my_tag)

content.label: Content
content.hint: Text that will be inserted when you use @{{tagName}} in task descriptions
content.placeholder: Enter the text that will be inserted when you use this tag

safety.title: Safety & Disclaimers
safety.description: Reset acknowledgments for safety warnings and onboarding.

beta.title: Beta Features
beta.description: Try out experimental features before they're released.

workspaces.label: Enable Sessions Beta
workspaces.helper: Use the new sessions interface when viewing sessions. Tasks will open in task view first, and attempts will open in the new sessions view.

agents.title: Coding Agent Configurations
agents.description: Customize the behavior of coding agents with different configurations.

availability.loginDetectedTooltip: Recent authentication credentials found for this agent
availability.installationFoundTooltip: Agent configuration found. You may need to log in to use it.

errors.deleteFailed: Failed to delete configuration. Please try again.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save agent configurations. Please try again.
errors.saveConfigFailed: Failed to save configuration. Please try again.
errors.schemaNotFound: Schema not found for executor type: {{executor}}

tree.selectConfig: Select a configuration from the sidebar to view and edit its settings.

deleteConfigDialog.title: Delete Configuration?
deleteConfigDialog.description: This will permanently remove "{{configName}}" from the {{executorType}} executor. You can't undo this action.

append_prompt.title: Append Prompt
append_prompt.description: Extra text appended to the prompt.

base_command_override.title: Base Command Override
base_command_override.description: Override the base command with a custom command.

additional_params.title: Additional Parameters
additional_params.description: Additional parameters appended to the base command.

env.title: Environment Variables
env.description: Environment variables set when running the executor.

picker.effortUnsupportedHermes: Hermes doesn't accept effort over ACP. Set model.reasoning_effort in ~/.hermes/config.yaml.

section.emptyHint: Select a provider to edit, or click + to add one.

form.name: Name
form.apiKeyOverrideHint: Leave empty to use the provider's top-level API key
form.fetchedCount: Fetched {{count}} models. Check ones to enable:
form.defaultDescription: Default provider passes through to each agent's native auth (claude login, codex login, gemini auth, etc.). No configuration needed.

mcp.title: MCP Server Configuration
mcp.description: Configure Model Context Protocol servers to extend coding agent capabilities with custom tools and resources.

labels.agentHelper: Choose which agent to configure MCP servers for.
labels.serverHelper: Click a card to insert that MCP Server into the JSON above.

errors.applyFailed: Failed to apply MCP server configuration
errors.supportMessage: To use MCP servers, please select a different executor that supports MCP (Claude, Amp, Gemini, Codex, or Opencode) above.

selector.label: Select Project
selector.helper: Select a project to view and edit its configuration.

name.label: Project Name
name.helper: A display name for this project.

repoPath.label: Git Repository Path
repoPath.helper: The absolute path to your git repository on disk.

save.confirmSwitch: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to switch projects? Your changes will be lost.

repositories.title: Repositories
repositories.description: Manage the git repositories in this project

repos.title: Folder Configuration
repos.description: Configure scripts that run when this folder is used in sessions.

addRepo.dialogDescription: Choose a folder to register. Git folders enable version control features.

selector.label: Select Folder
selector.helper: Select a folder to view and edit its configuration.

displayName.label: Display Name
displayName.helper: A friendly name for this folder.

defaultWorkingDir.label: Default Working Directory
defaultWorkingDir.helper: Subdirectory relative to the folder root where the coding agent runs. Set when the session is created. Leave empty to use the folder root.

defaultTargetBranch.label: Default Target Branch
defaultTargetBranch.helper: The default base branch for new sessions. Worktrees branch off from this branch and PRs will target it.

scripts.title: Scripts & Configuration
scripts.description: Configure dev server, setup, cleanup, and copy files for this folder. These scripts run whenever the folder is used in any session.

setup.label: Setup Script
setup.helper: This script runs from within the worktree after it's created and before the coding agent starts. Use it for setup tasks like installing dependencies or preparing the environment.
setup.parallelLabel: Run setup script in parallel with coding agent
setup.parallelHelper: When enabled, the setup script runs simultaneously with the coding agent instead of waiting for setup to complete first.

cleanup.label: Cleanup Script
cleanup.helper: This script runs from within the worktree after coding agent execution, only if changes were made. Use it for quality assurance tasks like running linters, formatters, tests, or other validation steps.

archive.label: Archive Script
archive.helper: This script runs from within the worktree when the session is archived. Use it for cleanup tasks like stopping services, releasing resources, or saving state.

copyFiles.label: Copy Files
copyFiles.helper: Comma-separated list of files to copy from the original folder to the worktree. Useful for environment files like .env. Make sure these are gitignored!
copyFiles.placeholder: File paths or glob patterns (e.g., .env, config/*.json)

devServer.label: Dev Server Script
devServer.helper: Starts a development server for this folder. Scripts execute from within the folder's worktree directory.

linkedProjects.title: Linked Projects
linkedProjects.description: Projects that use this folder in their default session configuration.

remove.title: Remove Folder
remove.description: Unlink this folder from cdesktop. Files on disk will not be deleted.
remove.dialogDescription: This will unlink the folder from cdesktop. Your files on disk will not be affected. You can re-add it later.

save.confirmSwitch: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to switch folders? Your changes will be lost.

relay.title: Remote Access
relay.description: Allow access to this instance from the web via relay tunnel.

enabled.label: Enable remote access
enabled.helper: When enabled, this instance can be accessed remotely through a relay tunnel.

enrollmentCode.label: Pairing Code
enrollmentCode.helper: Enter this code in the browser to pair with this instance.
enrollmentCode.loginRequired: Log in to generate a pairing code.

remoteProjects.title: Remote Projects
remoteProjects.noProjects: No projects yet. Create one to get started.

statuses.label: Project Statuses
statuses.description: Manage kanban columns for this project.

defaultRepos.label: Default Repositories
defaultRepos.description: Repositories that are automatically added when creating sessions from this project's issues.
defaultRepos.noBranches: No branches found for this repository

loginRequired.title: Sign in required
loginRequired.description: Sign in to manage your remote projects.

cliSetup.description: GitHub CLI authentication is required to create pull requests and interact with GitHub repositories.

steps.checkInstalled: Check if GitHub CLI (gh) is installed
steps.installHomebrew: Install it via Homebrew if needed (macOS)

cliSetup.setupNote: The setup will run in the chat window. You'll need to complete the authentication in your browser.

errors.brewMissing: Homebrew is not installed. Install it to enable automatic setup.
errors.notSupported: Automatic setup is not supported on this platform. Install GitHub CLI manually.
errors.setupFailed: Failed to run GitHub CLI setup.

homebrew.manualInstall: and then rerun the setup. Alternatively, install GitHub CLI manually with:
